message:
test(frankenctl): assert verify report metadata fields in benchmark CLI tests

Extend benchmark_score_and_verify_bundle_round_trip and
benchmark_verify_detects_results_digest_tampering tests to assert
trace_id, decision_id, policy_id, and component fields in verify
report output, ensuring the full audit trail is preserved through
the verify pipeline.

Also update beads issue tracker timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
